Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION
REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Votes.VoteType: Favorable refer to committee Ways and Means

Title: Relates to the clergy property tax exemption
Summary: Provides that real property owned by a minister of the gospel, priest or rabbi of any denomination, an actual resident and inhabitant of this state, who is engaged in the work assigned by the church or denomination of which such person is a member, or who is unable to perform such work due to impaired health or is over seventy years of age, shall be exempt from taxation to the extent of fifteen hundred dollars.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property tax law, in relation to the clergy property tax exemption
